CustomField.description: Auto-maintained by the Insurance recalculation flow. One entry per active-policy insurance: "Policy Name (Record Type) - Medical, Dental, Vision" where the coverage list shows whichever of Medical/Dental/Vision the contact holds on that policy. Do not edit manually. (활성 보험 요약 - 정책별 Medical/Dental/Vision 포함, 자동 계산, 수동 편집 금지)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated list of active insurances with each policy's Medical/Dental/Vision coverage; do not edit manually. (활성 보험 목록 + 정책별 커버리지 자동 계산. 수동 편집 금지.)
CustomField.label: Active Insurance Summary
